dct_title_s: England Wales Scotland and Ireland : described and abridged with ye historic relation of things worth memory from a farr larger voulume
dct_description_sm: Index: The table to find the maps as appeareth by folio.
Last 4 pages blank (included in page description).
Engraved, hand colored title page; head-pieces throughout.

Statistical information: A catalogue of all the shires, citties, bishoprickes, market townes, castles, parishes, rivers, bridges, chases, forrests, and parkes, conteyned in every particuler shire of the Kingdom of England.
Maps show topography, vegetation, waterways, ports.
Maps 23 and 25 are switched in placement.
Maps 43, 44, 45, and 46 appear on one plate, numbered 43.
Some titles differ between map and descriptive text; alternatives noted in sqaure brackets.

Map 1. England Scotland and Ireland -- Map 2. The Kingdome of England -- Map 3. Kent -- Map 4. Sussex -- Map 5. Surrey -- Map 6. Sout. Hampton = [Hant-Shire] -- Map 7. Wight Island -- Map 8. Map 51. Mounmouth Shire = [Monmouth-Shire] -- Map 52. Montgomerie Merionidh Shires = [Mountgomery-Shire; Merioneth-Shire] -- Map 53. Denbigh and Flint discribed = [Denbigh-Shire; Flint-Shire] -- Map 54. Anglesey and Carnarvan = [Caernarvon-Shire] -- Map 55. The Kingdome of Scotland -- Map 56. The south pt. of Scotland wherin are contayned Edinbrough St Andrew and Glasco Archbisho. / Petrus Kaerius caelavit. -- Map 57. The southern part of Scotland, wherin is ye Strange Lake Lomund / Petrus Kaerius caelavit -- Map 58. The eastern part of Scotland wherin ther are diuers Shires and the University of Aberdyn / Petrus Kaerius caelavit -- Map 59. Part of Scotland it is called of the inhabitance Stranauerne with his borderers / Petrus Kaerius caelavit ; 1599 -- Map 60. The Iles of Hebrides wth ther borderers / Petrus Kaerius caelavit -- Map 61. Cathanes and Orknay. Ins. / Petrus Kaerius caela. -- Map 62. The Kingdome of Ireland -- Map 63.
